title: ContingentFeatureMarkers
description: Schema for morphological realizations contingent on multiple features.

source_path.description: The file path from which this config was loaded.

inner_feature.description: The name of the feature whose values define the inner branches of the hierarchy.

outer_feature.description: The name of the feature whose values define the outer branches of the hierarchy.

global_order.description: Allows specifying a default value for the 'order' attribute.

global_markers.description: A marker or list of markers applied to all forms in this paradigm.

markers.description: An array over outer feature values.

outer_feature_value.description: The feature value specified for the outer feature for all child nodes.
